textAr: حمٓ
textEn: Ḥā, Meem.

textAr: وَٱلْكِتَـٰبِ ٱلْمُبِينِ
textEn: By the clear Book,

textAr: إِنَّآ أَنزَلْنَـٰهُ فِى لَيْلَةٍ مُّبَـٰرَكَةٍ ۚ إِنَّا كُنَّا مُنذِرِينَ
textEn: Indeed, We sent it down during a blessed night. Indeed, We were to warn [mankind].

textAr: فِيهَا يُفْرَقُ كُلُّ أَمْرٍ حَكِيمٍ
textEn: Therein [i.e., on that night] is made distinct every precise matter -

textAr: أَمْرًا مِّنْ عِندِنَآ ۚ إِنَّا كُنَّا مُرْسِلِينَ
textEn: [Every] matter [proceeding] from Us. Indeed, We were to send [a messenger]

textAr: رَحْمَةً مِّن رَّبِّكَ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلسَّمِيعُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
textEn: As mercy from your Lord. Indeed, He is the Hearing, the Knowing,

textAr: رَبِّ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَآ ۖ إِن كُنتُم مُّوقِنِينَ
textEn: Lord of the heavens and the earth and that between them, if you would be certain.

textAr: لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ يُحْىِۦ وَيُمِيتُ ۖ رَبُّكُمْ وَرَبُّ ءَابَآئِكُمُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
textEn: There is no deity except Him; He gives life and causes death. [He is] your Lord and the Lord of your first forefathers.

textAr: بَلْ هُمْ فِى شَكٍّ يَلْعَبُونَ
textEn: But they are in doubt, amusing themselves.

textAr: فَٱرْتَقِبْ يَوْمَ تَأْتِى ٱلسَّمَآءُ بِدُخَانٍ مُّبِينٍ
textEn: Then watch for the Day when the sky will bring a visible smoke

textAr: يَغْشَى ٱلنَّاسَ ۖ هَـٰذَا عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ
textEn: Covering the people; this is a painful torment.

textAr: رَّبَّنَا ٱكْشِفْ عَنَّا ٱلْعَذَابَ إِنَّا مُؤْمِنُونَ
textEn: [They will say], "Our Lord, remove from us the torment; indeed, we are believers."

textAr: أَنَّىٰ لَهُمُ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰ وَقَدْ جَآءَهُمْ رَسُولٌ مُّبِينٌ
textEn: How will there be for them a reminder [at that time]? And there had come to them a clear Messenger.

textAr: ثُمَّ تَوَلَّوْا۟ عَنْهُ وَقَالُوا۟ مُعَلَّمٌ مَّجْنُونٌ
textEn: Then they turned away from him and said, "[He was] taught [and is] a madman."

textAr: إِنَّا كَاشِفُوا۟ ٱلْعَذَابِ قَلِيلًا ۚ إِنَّكُمْ عَآئِدُونَ
textEn: Indeed, We will remove the torment for a little. Indeed, you [disbelievers] will return [to disbelief].

textAr: يَوْمَ نَبْطِشُ ٱلْبَطْشَةَ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰٓ إِنَّا مُنتَقِمُونَ
textEn: The Day We will strike with the greatest assault, indeed, We will take retribution.

textAr: ۞ وَلَقَدْ فَتَنَّا قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمَ فِرْعَوْنَ وَجَآءَهُمْ رَسُولٌ كَرِيمٌ
textEn: And We had already tried before them the people of Pharaoh, and there came to them a noble messenger [i.e., Moses],

textAr: أَنْ أَدُّوٓا۟ إِلَىَّ عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ ۖ إِنِّى لَكُمْ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٌ
textEn: [Saying], "Render to me the servants of Allāh. Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger,"

textAr: وَأَن لَّا تَعْلُوا۟ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ ۖ إِنِّىٓ ءَاتِيكُم بِسُلْطَـٰنٍ مُّبِينٍ
textEn: And [saying], "Be not haughty with Allāh. Indeed, I have come to you with clear evidence.

textAr: وَإِنِّى عُذْتُ بِرَبِّى وَرَبِّكُمْ أَن تَرْجُمُونِ
textEn: And indeed, I have sought refuge in my Lord and your Lord, lest you stone me.

textAr: وَإِن لَّمْ تُؤْمِنُوا۟ لِى فَٱعْتَزِلُونِ
textEn: But if you do not believe me, then leave me alone."

textAr: فَدَعَا رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنَّ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ قَوْمٌ مُّجْرِمُونَ
textEn: And [finally] he called to his Lord that these were a criminal people.

textAr: فَأَسْرِ بِعِبَادِى لَيْلًا إِنَّكُم مُّتَّبَعُونَ
textEn: [Allāh said], "Then set out with My servants by night. Indeed, you are to be pursued.

textAr: وَٱتْرُكِ ٱلْبَحْرَ رَهْوًا ۖ إِنَّهُمْ جُندٌ مُّغْرَقُونَ
textEn: And leave the sea in stillness. Indeed, they are an army to be drowned."

textAr: كَمْ تَرَكُوا۟ مِن جَنَّـٰتٍ وَعُيُونٍ
textEn: How much they left behind of gardens and springs

textAr: وَزُرُوعٍ وَمَقَامٍ كَرِيمٍ
textEn: And crops and noble sites

textAr: وَنَعْمَةٍ كَانُوا۟ فِيهَا فَـٰكِهِينَ
textEn: And comfort wherein they were amused.

textAr: كَذَٰلِكَ ۖ وَأَوْرَثْنَـٰهَا قَوْمًا ءَاخَرِينَ
textEn: Thus. And We caused to inherit it another people.

textAr: فَمَا بَكَتْ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلسَّمَآءُ وَٱلْأَرْضُ وَمَا كَانُوا۟ مُنظَرِينَ
textEn: And the heaven and earth wept not for them, nor were they reprieved.

textAr: وَلَقَدْ نَجَّيْنَا بَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ مِنَ ٱلْعَذَابِ ٱلْمُهِينِ
textEn: And We certainly saved the Children of Israel from the humiliating torment -

textAr: مِن فِرْعَوْنَ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ عَالِيًا مِّنَ ٱلْمُسْرِفِينَ
textEn: From Pharaoh. Indeed, he was a haughty one among the transgressors.

textAr: وَلَقَدِ ٱخْتَرْنَـٰهُمْ عَلَىٰ عِلْمٍ عَلَى ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
textEn: And We certainly chose them by knowledge over [all] the worlds.

textAr: وَءَاتَيْنَـٰهُم مِّنَ ٱلْـَٔايَـٰتِ مَا فِيهِ بَلَـٰٓؤٌا۟ مُّبِينٌ
textEn: And We gave them of signs that in which there was a clear trial.

textAr: إِنَّ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ لَيَقُولُونَ
textEn: Indeed, these [disbelievers] are saying,

textAr: إِنْ هِىَ إِلَّا مَوْتَتُنَا ٱلْأُولَىٰ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمُنشَرِينَ
textEn: "There is not but our first death, and we will not be resurrected.

textAr: فَأْتُوا۟ بِـَٔابَآئِنَآ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰدِقِينَ
textEn: Then bring [back] our forefathers, if you should be truthful."

textAr: أَهُمْ خَيْرٌ أَمْ قَوْمُ تُبَّعٍ وَٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ ۚ أَهْلَكْنَـٰهُمْ ۖ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ مُجْرِمِينَ
textEn: Are they better or the people of Tubbaʿ1 and those before them? We destroyed them, [for] indeed, they were criminals.

textAr: وَمَا خَلَقْنَا ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا لَـٰعِبِينَ
textEn: And We did not create the heavens and earth and that between them in play.

textAr: مَا خَلَقْنَـٰهُمَآ إِلَّا بِٱلْحَقِّ وَلَـٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
textEn: We did not create them except in truth, but most of them do not know.

textAr: إِنَّ يَوْمَ ٱلْفَصْلِ مِيقَـٰتُهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
textEn: Indeed, the Day of Judgement is the appointed time for them all -

textAr: يَوْمَ لَا يُغْنِى مَوْلًى عَن مَّوْلًى شَيْـًٔا وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
textEn: The Day when no relation will avail a relation at all, nor will they be helped -

textAr: إِلَّا مَن رَّحِمَ ٱللَّهُ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
textEn: Except those [believers] on whom Allāh has mercy. Indeed, He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.

textAr: إِنَّ شَجَرَتَ ٱلزَّقُّومِ
textEn: Indeed, the tree of zaqqūm

textAr: طَعَامُ ٱلْأَثِيمِ
textEn: Is food for the sinful.

textAr: كَٱلْمُهْلِ يَغْلِى فِى ٱلْبُطُونِ
textEn: Like murky oil, it boils within bellies

textAr: كَغَلْىِ ٱلْحَمِيمِ
textEn: Like the boiling of scalding water.

textAr: خُذُوهُ فَٱعْتِلُوهُ إِلَىٰ سَوَآءِ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
textEn: [It will be commanded], "Seize him and drag him into the midst of the Hellfire,

textAr: ثُمَّ صُبُّوا۟ فَوْقَ رَأْسِهِۦ مِنْ عَذَابِ ٱلْحَمِيمِ
textEn: Then pour over his head from the torment of scalding water."

textAr: ذُقْ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْكَرِيمُ
textEn: [It will be said], "Taste! Indeed, you are the honored, the noble!

textAr: إِنَّ هَـٰذَا مَا كُنتُم بِهِۦ تَمْتَرُونَ
textEn: Indeed, this is what you used to dispute."

textAr: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى مَقَامٍ أَمِينٍ
textEn: Indeed, the righteous will be in a secure place:

textAr: فِى جَنَّـٰتٍ وَعُيُونٍ
textEn: Within gardens and springs,

textAr: يَلْبَسُونَ مِن سُندُسٍ وَإِسْتَبْرَقٍ مُّتَقَـٰبِلِينَ
textEn: Wearing [garments of] fine silk and brocade, facing each other.

textAr: كَذَٰلِكَ وَزَوَّجْنَـٰهُم بِحُورٍ عِينٍ
textEn: Thus. And We will marry them to fair women with large, [beautiful] eyes.

textAr: يَدْعُونَ فِيهَا بِكُلِّ فَـٰكِهَةٍ ءَامِنِينَ
textEn: They will call therein for every [kind of] fruit - safe and secure.

textAr: لَا يَذُوقُونَ فِيهَا ٱلْمَوْتَ إِلَّا ٱلْمَوْتَةَ ٱلْأُولَىٰ ۖ وَوَقَىٰهُمْ عَذَابَ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
textEn: They will not taste death therein except the first death, and He will have protected them from the punishment of Hellfire

textAr: فَضْلًا مِّن رَّبِّكَ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ هُوَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْعَظِيمُ
textEn: As bounty from your Lord. That is what is the great attainment.

textAr: فَإِنَّمَا يَسَّرْنَـٰهُ بِلِسَانِكَ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَتَذَكَّرُونَ
textEn: And indeed, We have eased it [i.e., the Qur’ān] in your tongue that they might be reminded.

textAr: فَٱرْتَقِبْ إِنَّهُم مُّرْتَقِبُونَ
textEn: So watch, [O Muḥammad]; indeed, they are watching [for your end].
